summary: The pre-fix extension attached its bearer credential to any loopback-host API request instead of binding it to the exact configured Lumi server origin. Current model-free Sergeant returned the same generic missing-tests finding for the vulnerable snapshot and the fixed clean control.
learning_objectives: Bind credentials to the exact configured trusted destination rather than a broad host category or path prefix.
Distinguish vulnerable and repaired code states instead of emitting an identical generic assurance finding.
Create clean controls for same host with different port, scheme, subdomain, IPv4 or IPv6 loopback, malformed server configuration, redirects, Request objects, and existing credential headers.
